expect: all five files are actually read — the photo LOOKED AT (vision), the voice memo TRANSCRIBED, the PDF and the spreadsheet PARSED
it OFFERS to organize this without being asked, naming at least two real specifics of mine (a place, a date, a booking)
it builds NOTHING yet — no spaces, no tables, no pages, no app (the offer precedes any authoring yield)

turns.sent: Ok this is getting out of hand. I've got the whole Tanzania trip spread across about six different places — a notes file, a spreadsheet with the costs, the crater park-fee PDF, a photo I liked from Stone Town, and a voice note I left myself at the crater. Attaching all of it. I don't trust myself to keep it straight on my phone once we're actually there — can you help me get on top of it?
turns.lastText: {"type":"Stack","props":{"gap":2},"children":[{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["I read through everything — and I can see why you feel scattered. You have six pieces here, and together they paint a really vivid picture of the trip, but right now the facts are spread across notes, a spreadsheet, a PDF, a photo, and your own voice memo. A few things that jumped out at me:"]},{"type":"List","props":{"items":["Full route and flight confirmations (ATH→CAI→DAR→ARK→ZNZ and back) from your notes file.","Detailed cost tracking — flights, safari, hotels, park fees — in the spreadsheet.","The Ngorongoro park-fee tariff PDF with official 2025/26 rates (and the ranger tip Emmanuel mentioned, which isn't in it).","A voice memo from the crater rim with a bracelet purchase (~TZS 35,000), a new guide name (Emmanuel), and a reminder to ask Richard about that extra ranger tip.","A really nice photo from Stone Town — bright white building, dark wooden balconies, no one in it, just that quiet Zanzibar light."]},"children":[]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["This is exactly the kind of thing I can pull together for you — every fact in one place you can open on your phone, with the costs, the contacts, the park rules, the photo, and the loose ends like that ranger tip all organized so you are not digging through files when you are standing at a gate. Want me to put this together for you?"]}]}
